mapper.insert: insert into message(id, from_id, to_id, conversation_id, content, status, create_time) values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{senderUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{recipientUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{topic}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, from_id as senderUserId, to_id as recipientUserId, conversation_id as topic, content, status, create_time as createTime from message where status != 2 and and to_id = #{userId} and conversation_id = #{topic} order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
